title: Best of Kenya Safari – South Edition
description: Kenya pioneered the safari experience and remains one of the most diverse wildlife destinations in the world. From snow-capped mountains to lush rainforests and golden beaches, this safari combines incredible landscapes, unique wildlife and vibrant cultures. The journey takes you across iconic parks and the beautiful Kenyan coast, offering a perfect balance of adventure and relaxation.
highlights: Amboseli National Park with views of Mount Kilimanjaro
Tsavo West volcanic landscapes and wildlife
Relaxing stay at Diani Beach on the Indian Ocean
Game drives in the Maasai Mara
Opportunity to witness the Great Wildebeest Migration (July–October)

itinerary.title: Arrival and Transfer to Amboseli
itinerary.description: Arrival and transfer to Amboseli Serena Lodge. Enjoy views of Mount Kilimanjaro and an evening game drive.

itinerary.title: Amboseli National Park
itinerary.description: Full day exploring Amboseli with game drives and spectacular sightings of elephants and other wildlife.

itinerary.title: Transfer to Tsavo West
itinerary.description: Drive to Tsavo West and check in at Kilaguni Serena Lodge. Afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Explore Tsavo West
itinerary.description: Game drives across the rugged landscapes of Tsavo West including lava flows and wildlife habitats.

itinerary.title: Train to Mombasa – Transfer to Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Travel by first-class train from Tsavo West to Mombasa and transfer to Baobab Beach Resort & Spa.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach Leisure
itinerary.description: Relax on the white sandy beaches of Diani with optional water sports and resort activities.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Another full day to relax and enjoy the Indian Ocean coastline.

itinerary.title: Fly to Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Flight from Diani to Maasai Mara. Transfer to Ashnil Safari Camp and afternoon game drive.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara Safari
itinerary.description: Full day exploring the Maasai Mara with opportunities to witness the Great Wildebeest Migration depending on season.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning game drive followed by flight to Nairobi for departure.

included: Accommodation on full board basis at Amboseli Serena Lodge, Kilaguni Serena Lodge and Ashnil Safari Camp
All-inclusive stay at Baobab Beach Resort & Spa
First-class train ticket Tsavo West to Mombasa
Flight Maasai Mara to Wilson Airport
notIncluded: Laundry, phone calls and additional meals or drinks
accommodation: Kilaguni Serena Lodge – Tsavo West (2 nights)
Baobab Beach Resort & Spa – Diani Beach (3 nights)
Ashnil Safari Camp – Maasai Mara (2 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, a hat and sunglasses. Evenings and early mornings in the highlands can be cool so a sweater or light jacket is recommended.
travelInfo.food: Most lodges serve international buffet meals with dessert prepared by professional chefs. Some properties may offer a set menu depending on the lodge.

note: Berleen Safaris LTD reserves the right to substitute accommodations with similar facilities in circumstances beyond our control.
